title: Blue Canyon Toilet Roll Holder Chrome Free Standing Toilet Paper Holder Spike, Toilet Paper Storage, Toilet Paper Roll Holder, Toilet Roll Storage, Toilet Paper Organizer
features: 【 FREESTANDING DESIGN 】: The freestanding design allows for easy installation and eliminates the need for wall mounting, making it a convenient solution for renters or anyone who wants to avoid drilling holes in their walls. Our toilet paper storage spike is convenient for a clutter-free bathroom.

【 EASY INSTALLATION 】: Our chrome toilet roll storage is easy to assemble and move, allowing you to position it wherever it is most convenient. No drilling, no Screw, no mess, no glue, no holes or damage to walls. These free-standing toilet roll holders are ideal for all sizes of toilet rolls.

【 DURABLE BASE 】: The durable base provides stability and prevents tipping, ensuring your toilet paper is always accessible when needed. The compact and space-saving design takes up minimal floor space, making it ideal for small bathrooms or powder rooms.

【 STURDY HOLDER 】: The sturdy design ensures that the holder remains in place and does not wobble, providing a stable and reliable place to store your toilet paper. The raised base helps keep the rolls dry from spills on the floor.
